reason: PartSLIP2/PartSLIP++ expects 3D point-cloud/PartNetE-style inputs, category checkpoints, GLIP/SAM dependencies, and 3D-to-2D projection assets. VG-AlignSeg final test data provides object-centric 8-view RGBA images and 2D part masks.
reported_adapter: PartSLIP2 2D proposal adapter; not a native PartSLIP2 result.
